module.name: sticky
module.description: A sticky-note memo you place and size yourself in Edit layout (move + resize freely). Tilt with the rotate argument.

param.name: rotate
param.label: Rotation
param.desc: Tilt of the note in degrees

snippet.label: Sticky Note
snippet.text: <!-- @sticky rotate: 3 --> **Memo** Please update these figures by the meeting next week! <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A sticky note-style memo placed diagonally.
